acceptance_criteria.description: Scope-pinned commit contains exactly the six M1 paths
acceptance_criteria.given: dev ran git add -- <path> on each of the six M1 paths (and only those paths)
acceptance_criteria.when: git show --format= --name-only HEAD is run after the commit
acceptance_criteria.then: the output lists exactly these six paths and no others: docs/dev/note-20260524-123039-root-bin-manual-commit.md, docs/dev/ticket-20260524-123039.md, docs/dev/context-20260524-123039.json, docs/dev/acceptance-criteria-20260524-123039.json, docs/dev/ba-qa-report-20260524-123039.json, docs/dev/INDEX.md; AND git log -1 --format=%B contains a standalone body line that reads exactly 'Task-id: 20260524-123039'

acceptance_criteria.description: Manual-commit note exists with exact commands
acceptance_criteria.then: the file contains: the exact path /root/bin/happy-session-recovery.sh; the repo root /root; a 'git add /root/bin/happy-session-recovery.sh' command; a 'git commit -m ...' command with a descriptive message; and the three Gap descriptions (tombstone timing, snapshot persistence, MemoryMax defaults) copied from docs/dev/close-report-20260524-101700.md
the command field equals redev and does not equal close
